name: apex-f1
description: Shareable APK: cd mobile && npm run build:android — see mobile/BUILD-APK.md

scripts.dev:web: cd mobile && env -u CI npx expo start --web --port 8083
scripts.dev:web:local: cd mobile && env -u CI EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 npx expo start --web --port 8083
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web:local"
scripts.dev:phone: concurrently -k -n api,expo -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:phone:expo"
scripts.dev:phone:lan: concurrently -k -n api,expo -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:phone:expo:lan"
scripts.dev:phone:expo: cd mobile && env -u CI npx expo start --tunnel --go
scripts.dev:phone:expo:lan: cd mobile && env -u CI npx expo start --lan --go
scripts.build:web:local: cd mobile && env EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 npx expo export --platform web
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run docker:api
